tokens.name: brand.color.primary
tokens.description: Primary Wealth Map accent used for key emphasis, selected state, and widget identity.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Use with sufficient contrast and avoid communicating state by color alone.

tokens.name: brand.color.primary.strong
tokens.description: Stronger brand accent for gradients and high-emphasis brand surfaces.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Use as a supporting brand color, not as body text on dark backgrounds.

tokens.name: semantic.color.text.primary
tokens.description: Default primary text color.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Follows platform contrast and color-scheme settings.

tokens.name: semantic.color.text.secondary
tokens.description: Secondary supporting text color.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Avoid using for critical warnings or validation errors.

tokens.name: semantic.color.surface.card
tokens.description: Elevated card surface used for grouped financial summaries.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Content on this surface must remain readable in light and dark modes.

tokens.name: semantic.color.status.success
tokens.description: Positive or available status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair with text, icons, or labels that identify the state.

tokens.name: semantic.color.status.warning
tokens.description: Warning, stale, or attention-needed status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair with text, icons, or labels that identify the state.

tokens.name: semantic.color.status.danger
tokens.description: Destructive, debt, error, or unavailable status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair with explicit destructive or error copy.

tokens.name: semantic.color.status.neutral
tokens.description: Neutral informational or inactive status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Use for non-critical status labels.

tokens.name: typography.amount.prominent
tokens.description: Prominent monetary value text.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Must scale with user text-size settings and support compact notation.

tokens.name: typography.label.compact
tokens.description: Compact labels, badges, and metadata.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Do not use as the only presentation of critical information at very small sizes.

tokens.name: spacing.card.padding
tokens.description: Default internal padding for reusable card surfaces.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Increase in local layouts when Dynamic Type or long labels need more room.

tokens.name: spacing.inline.xs
tokens.description: Small inline spacing between compact icon and label elements.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Keep tap targets governed by platform minimums, not this spacing value.

tokens.name: shape.radius.card
tokens.description: Default radius for grouped app card surfaces.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Shape must not be the only cue for state.

tokens.name: shape.radius.pill
tokens.description: Fully rounded badge and compact label shape.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair with text for meaning.

tokens.name: elevation.card
tokens.description: Subtle card lift used by repeated grouped surfaces.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Do not rely on shadow alone to separate critical content.

tokens.name: icon.size.status
tokens.description: Compact status icon size used beside labels and badge text.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Icons that carry meaning need accessible labels or adjacent text.

tokens.name: chart.color.asset
tokens.description: Asset and positive-total chart/status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair chart colors with legends or labels.

tokens.name: chart.color.liability
tokens.description: Liability, debt, and negative-total chart/status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair chart colors with legends or labels.

tokens.name: chart.color.netWorth
tokens.description: Net worth trend and brand-highlight chart/status treatment.
tokens.accessibilityNotes: Pair chart colors with labels and values.

tokens.name: motion.intent.standard
tokens.description: Default motion intent for subtle state transitions.

platformValues.web: transition: standard duration and easing when appropriate

tokens.accessibilityNotes: Respect reduced-motion settings.

tokens.name: motion.intent.reduced
tokens.description: Reduced-motion equivalent for transitions that should become instant or minimal.

platformValues.web: Use prefers-reduced-motion to remove nonessential animation

tokens.accessibilityNotes: Must remain functionally equivalent to standard motion.
